message:
fix(fr-command): MEMORY subcommand error parity with upstream

Two MEMORY subcommand divergences:

- MEMORY DOCTOR/MALLOC-STATS/PURGE/STATS/HELP with extra args
  emitted 'ERR syntax error'; upstream object.c::memoryCommand
  emits 'ERR wrong number of arguments for memory|<sub> command'
  via the standard subcommand wrong-arity reply.
  (br-frankenredis-marg)

- MEMORY USAGE k SAMPLES 0 was rejected as syntax error; upstream
  accepts 0 (default sampling). Only negative SAMPLES values
  surface SyntaxError. (br-frankenredis-musamp0)

Updates memory_subcommands_reject_invalid_syntax test to assert
on the new wrong-arity wording for the 5 affected subcommands and
to accept SAMPLES 0 as a valid Integer reply.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
